overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a forest trail toward a mountain village. The character passes under a ceremonial banner archway in a lush pine forest with snow-capped peaks visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest trail approaching mountain pass

events.description: large bird begins circling overhead in the sky
ceremonial banner archway becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path with swords on his back, approaching the banner archway

entered.detail: tall evergreen pine trees lining both sides of the trail with dense green foliage
large snow-covered mountain peak visible through the tree canopy in the distance
narrow winding dirt trail with patches of grass and rocks
large bird of prey circling high in the sky above the forest

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail through a dense pine forest. Tall evergreen trees flank both sides while a majestic snow-capped mountain dominates the distant view. A large bird circles overhead as the character approaches a ceremonial banner archway visible ahead on the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: ceremonial banner archway over forest trail

events.description: character passes underneath the hanging ceremonial banner archway
character briefly slows while looking up at the banners overhead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking under the ceremonial banner archway, continuing along the mountain trail

entered.detail: red and brown cloth banners hanging between wooden poles forming an arch over the path
tall wooden posts supporting the hanging ceremonial banners

segments.scene_description: The character passes underneath a ceremonial archway of red and brown banners suspended between wooden poles. The lighting becomes slightly dappled as the trail continues through the forest opening, with the snow-capped mountain still prominent ahead. The dense forest canopy opens up slightly around the archway area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow trail approaching mountain village

events.description: forest opens into wide grassy meadow with distant wooden structures visible
distant wooden village buildings become clearly visible on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the trail through open grassland toward distant village structures

notable_agents.action: large bird of prey continuing to circle overhead in the mountain thermals

entered.detail: wide open grassy field with tall wildflowers replacing the dense forest
wooden buildings and structures of a mountain village visible on the distant hillside

segments.scene_description: Beyond the banner archway, the forest opens into a wide grassy meadow with scattered pine trees. The trail continues toward a distant mountain village with wooden structures visible on the left horizon. The snow-capped mountain dominates the background while the bird continues circling overhead in the open sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense pine forest that gradually opens into a wide mountain meadow. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt trail flanked by tall evergreens, while a large bird circles overhead against the backdrop of a distant snow-capped mountain. As the character advances, the scene shifts as he passes beneath a ceremonial archway of red and brown banners, causing the dense canopy to break and the lighting to become dappled. The environment then expands beyond the archway into a sprawling grassy meadow with scattered pines, revealing a distant mountain village with wooden structures on the horizon. Finally, the camera continues its forward trajectory toward the village while the snow-capped peak remains dominant under the open sky.
